all_decisions_requiring_approval.item: Stock deduction timing: When should inventory be auto-deducted?
options: C: At order submission with reversal on cancel/void
all_decisions_requiring_approval.rationale: Deduct at submission with reversal provides real-time stock accuracy while handling cancellations. Matches F-004 and resolves UF-001 timing conflict.

all_decisions_requiring_approval.item: PIN verification scope: Single PIN per user or context-specific PINs?
options: A: Single pinHash on User entity (simpler)
B: Separate PinVerification entity with context-specific PINs
all_decisions_requiring_approval.rationale: Prototype uses single PIN for all contexts (shift, void, POS entry). BA spec says 'Owner can set and reset PIN per user'.

all_decisions_requiring_approval.item: Order-level vs item-level cooking status tracking
options: B: Both order and item level
C: Item level only, derive order status
all_decisions_requiring_approval.rationale: Dual tracking needed for additional items feature where new items pending while originals served.

all_decisions_requiring_approval.item: Transaction entity: denormalized order data or FK reference only?
options: A: Denormalize key fields for immutable receipt data
B: FK reference only, compute at read time
all_decisions_requiring_approval.rationale: Immutable financial records for auditing. Receipt reprinting must show original values even if prices change.

all_decisions_requiring_approval.item: API stock deduction timing: deduct at order submission or payment?
options: A: Deduct at submission with reversal
all_decisions_requiring_approval.rationale: Consistent with D-001. Prevents overselling, reversal via StockMovement entries.

all_decisions_requiring_approval.item: Sync conflict resolution strategy
options: B: Last-write-wins + domain-specific merge for financials
all_decisions_requiring_approval.rationale: Financial records immutable (append-only). Other entities use last-write-wins. CRDT overengineered for 5 users.

all_decisions_requiring_approval.item: Receipt generation: client-side HTML or server-side PDF?
all_decisions_requiring_approval.rationale: Offline-first requires printing without server. react-to-print for thermal-printer HTML.

all_decisions_requiring_approval.item: Excel export: client-side or server-side generation?
all_decisions_requiring_approval.rationale: SheetJS already in tech-stack. Works offline. Data endpoint provides structured data.

all_decisions_requiring_approval.item: Frontend framework: React 18 + TypeScript
all_decisions_requiring_approval.rationale: 17 screens within SPA comfort zone. No constraints override.

all_decisions_requiring_approval.item: State management: Zustand with persist middleware
all_decisions_requiring_approval.rationale: 15 entities + offline-first requires persist-to-IndexedDB. React Context cannot persist. 10 domain stores.

all_decisions_requiring_approval.item: Primary storage: Dexie.js (IndexedDB)
all_decisions_requiring_approval.rationale: Offline-first requires on-device data. PostgreSQL is sync target only.

all_decisions_requiring_approval.item: Authentication: local-auth-hash (bcrypt, NO JWT)
all_decisions_requiring_approval.rationale: CRITICAL: offline_first=true. JWT requires server. Auth uses bcrypt hash in IndexedDB.

all_decisions_requiring_approval.item: Backend framework: Express.js 4 (sync target only)
all_decisions_requiring_approval.rationale: Low concurrent users (5). Express serves as sync target, not primary API.

all_decisions_requiring_approval.item: Sync strategy: custom sync with change queue
all_decisions_requiring_approval.rationale: No BaaS specified. Custom handles online/offline detection, change queue, push/pull, conflict resolution.

all_decisions_requiring_approval.item: Server database: PostgreSQL
all_decisions_requiring_approval.rationale: Default for sync server. Flexible budget, no signal to downgrade.

all_decisions_requiring_approval.item: Architecture pattern: offline-first PWA
all_decisions_requiring_approval.rationale: All core features must work without internet. Frontend is source of truth.

all_decisions_requiring_approval.item: Multi-interface layout: 4 role-specific interfaces
all_decisions_requiring_approval.rationale: layout.json defines 4 interfaces optimized per role: bottom-tabs (waiter), fullscreen (kitchen), sidebar (admin), grid (dashboard).

all_decisions_requiring_approval.item: Store architecture: 10 Zustand stores (1 per domain)
all_decisions_requiring_approval.rationale: 10 domain groups need separation. Stores backed by Dexie tables as persistent layer.

all_decisions_requiring_approval.item: Cross-domain communication: event-style store actions
all_decisions_requiring_approval.rationale: 5 cross-domain flows. Actions wrapped in Dexie transactions for atomicity.

all_decisions_requiring_approval.item: Stock deduction timing: at order confirmation
all_decisions_requiring_approval.rationale: Consistent with D-001/D-030. Prevents overselling. Stock restored on cancel.

all_decisions_requiring_approval.item: Route structure: organized by interface context
all_decisions_requiring_approval.rationale: Routes match layout.json interfaces. Each uses its own layout component.

all_decisions_requiring_approval.item: PIN gate strategy: modal overlay with navigation context tracking
all_decisions_requiring_approval.rationale: Seamless POS-internal navigation while enforcing security on POS entry from outside.

api-design.json.navigation: Use domain_index to filter endpoints by relevant domain

next_action.action: Review proposal and provide approval via BA Agent
